bids.reasoning: At t=0.0 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. The opponent opened with all valueD, which is the lowest utility for me on every issue and gives no evidence yet of willingness to make balanced concessions.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still extremely early at t=0.02, so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has improved their offer slightly for me by moving issueA from valueD to valueC, but their bids are still far from attractive, so I will only concede on my lowest-weight issueD while holding firm on the more important issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.947 because it is still very early at t=0.04 and there is no need for major concessions yet. The opponent improved once from all valueD to issueA:valueC but then repeated the same offer, so they are not currently showing continued concession; I will concede only on my lowest-weight issueD while holding firm on higher-weight issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.90 because it is still very early at t=0.06, so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has only conceded on issueA while holding issueB, issueC, and issueD at valueD, so I will concede fully on my lowest-weight issueD while holding firm on the higher-weight issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid because it is still very early (t=0.08), and my previous concessions were only on the lowest-weight issueD. The opponent has conceded on issueA from valueD to valueA but is still holding issueB, issueC, and issueD at valueD, so I will keep firm on my high-weight issues while avoiding an exact repeat of my last bid.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making concessions mainly on my lowest-weight issue. The opponent has improved on issueA and recently issueB, but still holds issueC and issueD at valueD, so I will hold firm on my most important issues and concede issueD.

At t=0.12 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only a small concession on my lowest-weight issue. The opponent has improved some offers on issueA and issueB but continues to demand valueD on issueC and issueD, so I will hold firm on the higher-weight issues and avoid repeating my immediately previous bid.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.87 because it is still early in the negotiation, so there is no need to concede on the most important issues yet. The opponent has improved on issueA at times but continues to push low values on issueB-D, so I will hold firm on issueA and issueB while conceding on lower-weight issueC and issueD.

I targeted a still-high utility around 0.81 because it is early in the negotiation, so I should not concede on the highest-weight issues yet. The opponent has made some concessions but their offers to me remain low and inconsistent, with persistent pressure on valueD especially for issueD, so I concede mainly on lower-weight issueC and issueD while holding firm on issueA and issueB.

At t=0.18 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.87 rather than making major concessions. The opponent has improved offers somewhat on issueA and occasionally issueB/issueC, but they keep issueD at valueD, so I concede mainly on the low-weight issueD while holding firm on the more important issueA and issueB.

At t=0.20 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.81 while making some concessions on lower-weight issues. The opponent has improved from all valueD to offers including valueC and once valueA on issueA, but their offers still keep issueD at valueD, so I will concede issueD and some issueC while holding firm on high-weight issueA and issueB.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.866 because it is still early at t=0.22, so there is no need to make major concessions on the high-weight issues A and B. The opponent has made some concessions, especially occasionally improving issueA and issueC, but they continue to push low values on issueB and issueD; with no messages to consider, I will concede mainly on lower-weight issueD and modestly on issueC while holding A and B at my preferred values.

I am targeting a still-high utility around 0.84 because we are only at t=0.24, so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent’s offers have improved from all valueD to a latest bid worth about 0.42 to me, showing some concession but still far from my acceptable range. I will concede on lower-weight issueD and moderately on issueC while holding firm on the higher-weight issueA and issueB.

I am targeting a high but not maximal utility around 0.87, since we are still relatively early at t=0.26 and there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has gradually improved some issues for me but still keeps issueD low for me, so I will concede on low-weight issueD while holding firm on high-weight issueA and issueB and offering a moderate concession on issueC.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.81 while making a meaningful concession as we move into the early-mid phase. The opponent has improved their offers to me over time, especially on issueA and issueC, but they still keep issueB and issueD low; with no messages to weigh, I am responding to the numerical pattern by holding firm on high-weight issueA and issueB while conceding on lower-weight issueC and issueD.

I am targeting a utility around 0.79, making a modest concession from my last offer while still protecting issueA, my most important issue. At t=0.30 there is some time pressure to move beyond near-maximal bids, and the opponent has signaled willingness to give issueA=valueA but tends to hold out on issueB/issueD; with no messages, I rely only on the bid history.

I am targeting a utility a little above 0.8, since we are still in the early-mid phase and there is no need to concede too deeply yet. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat for me, especially on issueA/issueB/issueC at different times, but they still keep issueD low; with no messages to weigh, I am conceding mainly on lower-weight issues while holding issueA firm.

I am targeting a solid mid-game utility around 0.76, conceding further on lower-weight issues while protecting issueA, my most important issue. The opponent’s offers have improved in utility to me over time, with the latest all-valueC bid signaling some movement, but at t=0.34 there is still no need to drop near reservation. I am avoiding repeating my previous bid and offering a tradeoff that keeps issueA strong while moving issueC and issueD toward values the opponent has repeatedly proposed.

I am targeting a utility around 0.73, a modest concession from my previous 0.76 bid while preserving high-weight issueA and issueB. At t=0.36 there is still time, but the opponent has shown some concession on issueA and issueD while mostly holding tough on issueB/issueC, so I concede the lowest-weight issueD to valueD without giving up too much.
